must_detect.matched_text: Confidential — Indicative Term Sheet: Proposed Acquisition of HelixGrid Oy by Stonebridge Renewables N.V.
Structure: Acquisition of 70% of issued shares at signing with a call option for the remaining 30% exercisable 24–36 months post-closing.
Consideration: €148m cash at closing plus €32m earn-out; c.22% of Issuer’s last reported market capitalisation, assessed for issuer‑relative materiality and likely to be price-sensitive.

Timetable: Expected signing 28 June 2026; closing in Q4 2026, subject to Aurelia Financial Markets Authority (AFMA) merger clearance and customary approvals; this document constitutes inside information under EU MAR Art 7.

Sustainability undertakings: Post‑closing, Target to align with Issuer’s CSRD reporting and SFDR PAI indicators; no processing of special‑category personal data (GDPR Art 9) other than aggregated, anonymised workforce statistics for reporting.
Conditions precedent: AFMA merger clearance, employee information/consultation where required, no MAC, customary warranties, completion accounts in €, and notifications required by the ASE Rulebook.
Financing: Funded from existing cash and a committed €120m revolving facility from Venturo Bank S.A. (fictional), which has received only high‑level, non‑inside information to date.
